description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof, featuring a spacious backyard that includes a swimming pool, sun loungers, and a grassy area with palm trees. The house exterior combines white and gray finishes, with large rectangular windows arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns. The ground floor includes an open patio with outdoor dining and lounge furniture, as well as a covered garage and a cylindrical water tank. The upper floor has a large terrace with additional seating and a hot tub, accessible via sliding glass doors. A children's playset is visible in the backyard, and the property is enclosed by a low white wall. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a pool, and a spacious backyard featuring palm trees and outdoor amenities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pool, sun loungers, palm trees, and the main facade with large windows and a patio area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the grassy backyard, water tank, children's playset, and the upper terrace.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the garage, main entryway, and the arrangement of windows and doors on the back facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the terrace, outdoor dining area, and the pool extending along the side of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple wooden door with a small overhang, flush with the facade, and no prominent steps or porch.
